# terrible_dellemc_powerflex_info_v2 (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `filters` (String) List of filters to support filtered output for storage entities. Each filter is a dictionary with keys *filter_key*, *filter_operator*, *filter_value*. Supports passing of multiple filters.
- `full` (Boolean) Specify if response is full or brief. Applicable when *gather_subset* is `deployment`, `service_template`. For `deployment` specify to use full templates including resources in response.
- `gather_subset` (String) List of string variables to specify the PowerFlex storage system entities for which information is required. Devices - `device`. Deployments - `deployment`. FirmwareRepository - `firmware_repository`. Managed devices - `managed_device`. NVMe host - `nvme_host` NVMe Storage Data Target - `sdt`. Protection domains - `protection_domain`. SDCs - `sdc`. Service templates - `service_template`. Snapshot policies - `snapshot_policy`. Storage pools - `storage_pool`. Volumes - `vol`.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `include_attachments` (Boolean) Include attachments. Applicable when *gather_subset* is `service_template`.
- `include_bundles` (Boolean) Include software bundle entities. Applicable when *gather_subset* is `firmware_repository`.
- `include_devices` (Boolean) Include devices in response. Applicable when *gather_subset* is `deployment`.
- `include_template` (Boolean) Include service templates in response. Applicable when *gather_subset* is `deployment`.
- `limit` (Number) Page limit. Supported for *gather_subset* keys `service_template`, `managed_device`, `deployment`, `firmware_repository`.
- `offset` (Number) Pagination offset. Supported for *gather_subset* keys `service_template`, `managed_device`, `deployment`, `firmware_repository`.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sort` (String) Sort the returned components based on specified field. Supported for *gather_subset* keys `service_template`, `managed_device`, `deployment`, `firmware_repository`. The supported sort keys for the *gather_subset* can be referred from PowerFlex Manager API documentation in https://developer.dell.com.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `API_Version` (String) API version of PowerFlex API Gateway.
- `Array_Details` (String) System entities of PowerFlex storage array.
- `Deployments` (String) Details of all deployments.
- `Devices` (String) Details of devices.
- `FirmwareRepository` (String) Details of all firmware repository.
- `ManagedDevices` (String) Details of all devices from inventory.
- `NVMe_Hosts` (String) Details of all NVMe hosts.
- `Protection_Domains` (String) Details of all protection domains.
- `SDCs` (String) Details of storage data clients.
- `ServiceTemplates` (String) Details of all service templates.
- `Snapshot_Policies` (String) Details of snapshot policies.
- `Storage_Pools` (String) Details of storage pools.
- `Volumes` (String) Details of volumes.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `sdt` (String) Details of NVMe storage data targets.
